'''dholalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labelable|labelable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-l-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labelable|labelable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dholalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dholalithi|dholalithi]] || [[word:dholaliji|dholaliji]] || [[word:dholalishi|dholalishi]] || [[word:dholaliki|dholaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dholaluthuthu|dholaluthuthu]] || [[word:dholalujuju|dholalujuju]] || [[word:dholalushushu|dholalushushu]] || [[word:dholalukuku|dholalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dholaluthu|dholaluthu]] || [[word:dholaluju|dholaluju]] || [[word:dholalushu|dholalushu]] || [[word:dholaluku|dholaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dholalufthuf|dholalufthuf]] || [[word:dholalufjuf|dholalufjuf]] || [[word:dholalufshuf|dholalufshuf]] || [[word:dholalufkuf|dholalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dholalethe|dholalethe]] || [[word:dholaleje|dholaleje]] || [[word:dholaleshe|dholaleshe]] || [[word:dholaleke|dholaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dholalothotho|dholalothotho]] || [[word:dholalojojo|dholalojojo]] || [[word:dholaloshosho|dholaloshosho]] || [[word:dholalokoko|dholalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dholalotho|dholalotho]] || [[word:dholalojo|dholalojo]] || [[word:dholalosho|dholalosho]] || [[word:dholaloko|dholaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dholalofthof|dholalofthof]] || [[word:dholalofjof|dholalofjof]] || [[word:dholalofshof|dholalofshof]] || [[word:dholalofkof|dholalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dholalĂŻfthĂŻf|dholalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dholalĂŻfjĂŻf|dholalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dholalĂŻfshĂŻf|dholalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dholalĂŻfkĂŻf|dholalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dholalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dholalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dholalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dholalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dholalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dholalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dholalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dholalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dholalĂŻfthĂŻf|dholalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dholalĂŻfjĂŻf|dholalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dholalĂŻfshĂŻf|dholalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dholalĂŻfkĂŻf|dholalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dholalĂŻfthĂŻf|dholalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dholalĂŻfjĂŻf|dholalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dholalĂŻfshĂŻf|dholalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dholalĂŻfkĂŻf|dholalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dholalĂŠthĂŠ|dholalĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dholalĂŠjĂŠ|dholalĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dholalĂŠshĂŠ|dholalĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dholalĂŠkĂŠ|dholalĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dholalathatha|dholalathatha]] || [[word:dholalajaja|dholalajaja]] || [[word:dholalashasha|dholalashasha]] || [[word:dholalakaka|dholalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dholalatha|dholalatha]] || [[word:dholalaja|dholalaja]] || [[word:dholalasha|dholalasha]] || [[word:dholalaka|dholalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dholalafthaf|dholalafthaf]] || [[word:dholalafjaf|dholalafjaf]] || [[word:dholalafshaf|dholalafshaf]] || [[word:dholalafkaf|dholalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dholalasha|dholalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dholalshĂ«sha|dholalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dholalrosha|dholalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dholalmusha|dholalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dholalyasha|dholalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godholalnkshĂ«sha|godholalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godholalnkrosha|godholalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godholalnkmusha|godholalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godholalnkyasha|godholalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dholalalasha|dholalalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dholalalshĂ«sha|dholalalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dholalalrosha|dholalalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dholalalmusha|dholalalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dholalalyasha|dholalalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godholalalnkshĂ«sha|godholalalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godholalalnkrosha|godholalalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godholalalnkmusha|godholalalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godholalalnkyasha|godholalalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhelĂŠlasha|dhelĂŠlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhelĂŠlshĂ«sha|dhelĂŠlshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhelĂŠlrosha|dhelĂŠlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhelĂŠlmusha|dhelĂŠlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhelĂŠlyasha|dhelĂŠlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhelĂŠlnkshĂ«sha|godhelĂŠlnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhelĂŠlnkrosha|godhelĂŠlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhelĂŠlnkmusha|godhelĂŠlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhelĂŠlnkyasha|godhelĂŠlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dholfalasha|dholfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dholfalshĂ«sha|dholfalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dholfalrosha|dholfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dholfalmusha|dholfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dholfalyasha|dholfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godholfalnkshĂ«sha|godholfalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godholfalnkrosha|godholfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godholfalnkmusha|godholfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godholfalnkyasha|godholfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
